hero.title: Crypto Trading Signals with AI Precision
hero.subtitle: Receive accurate trading signals for major cryptocurrency pairs, analyzed by advanced artificial intelligence in real-time.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Our AI analyzes the market 24/7 to deliver accurate signals directly to you.
howItWorks.step1Description: Select the cryptocurrency pairs you want to monitor from our curated list.
howItWorks.step2Description: Our artificial intelligence continuously analyzes market patterns and trends.
howItWorks.step3Description: Get real-time alerts with entry points, stop loss, and take profit levels.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for smarter crypto trading.
features.feature1Description: Advanced algorithms analyze Smart Money Concepts patterns in real-time.
features.feature2Description: Signals for 1H and 4H timeframes to match your trading style.
features.feature3Description: Every signal includes stop loss and multiple take profit levels.
features.feature4Description: Get notified immediately when new high-quality signals are detected.
features.feature5Description: Access your complete trading history with detailed analytics.
features.feature6Description: Monitor up to 50 cryptocurrency pairs simultaneously.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your trading needs.

footer.disclaimer: Trading cryptocurrencies involves significant risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox for the password reset link.

dashboard.noSignals: No signals available for your current configuration.
dashboard.upgradePlan: Upgrade your plan to monitor more pairs.

history.title: Signal History
history.subtitle: View and analyze your past trading signals.
history.noSignals: No signals found for the selected filters.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences.
settings.notificationsDescription: Receive alerts when new signals are detected
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all data
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data.
